name: Haniel
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Haniel soft wing of Venus — kindness folded into light.
flowText: Haniel soft wing of Venus — kindness folded into light.

related.name: Emerald
related.teaser: Heart is the bridge—two breathing as one field of grace.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: Anael
related.teaser: Anael is a crown that unifies — Pentagram; under Venus; in Taurus; with III The Empress.

related.name: Rose Quartz
related.teaser: Heart is the bridge—two breathing as one field of grace.

related.name: Jade
related.teaser: Heart is the bridge—two breathing as one field of grace.

related.name: Aphrodite
related.teaser: Aphrodite is a breath that bridges — Pentagram; under Venus; in Taurus; with III The Empress.

related.name: ♎ Libra
related.teaser: Libra is the balance of air — lover’s mirror, scales of harmony, eye of justice.

related.name: III. The Empress
related.teaser: The Empress is the flowering womb, rose of Venus, matrix of compassion and abundance.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Elpis Archetype
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Sleipnir Mythos
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Quan Yin
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.
